hero.lead: Our true differentiator is the ability to establish physical and operational presence in complex locations and routes neglected by the competition.

sobre.title_a: With over 15 years of solid experience
sobre.text_a: In the Liechtenstein market, 7 Seas Global operates as an international freight forwarder, NVOCC, and trading company, connecting continents through intelligent multimodal transport solutions.
sobre.text_b_1: Is our active physical and operational presence where competition hesitates: we structure
sobre.text_b_2: collection and delivery in complex regions and overlooked areas of the map.

servicos.title: Services
servicos.s1_text: Complete and integrated end-to-end cargo transportation management.
servicos.s2_text: Issuance of own documentation (House BL) and autonomous consolidation of cargo, guaranteeing complete independence from traditional shipping lines.
servicos.s3_text: Global maritime transport focusing on route optimization and intelligent vessel space utilization.
servicos.s4_text: Agile and urgent transport solutions for corporate demands requiring reduced delivery times (lead time).
servicos.s5_text: Fully integrated national road transport network and dedicated solutions for cargo movement within the Mercosur bloc.
servicos.s6_text: Highly specialized cross-border logistics operations in trade flows between South American bloc member countries.
servicos.s7_text: Physical, operational, and documentary integration of multiple modes (maritime, rail, and road) under a single simplified management.
servicos.s8_text: Commercial intelligence with business intermediation, supplier sourcing, feasibility analysis, and strategic connection between global markets.
servicos.s9_text: Comprehensive customs advisory, rigorous documentary support, and security guarantee in customs clearance.

porque.title: Where others hesitate, we are already present
porque.lead_1: We are not a traditional logistics company that just waits for cargo to arrive at major hubs like São Paulo or Santos. Our differentiator is the
porque.lead_2: : a real and robust operational network that covers the market's most challenging and forgotten regions.

contato.title: Contato
contato.status_error_fields: Por favor, preencha todos os campos obrigatórios.
contato.status_error_checkbox: Você precisa aceitar os Termos e Políticas de Privacidade.

footer.tagline_1: We do not just enter markets. We establish a presence where others hesitate. Undiscovered. Unannounced.

privacidade.title: Privacy Policy
privacidade.intro: Your privacy is important to us. It is our policy to respect your privacy regarding any information we may collect from you across our website, and other sites we own and operate.
privacidade.s1_text: We only ask for personal information when we truly need it to provide a service to you. We collect it by fair and lawful means, with your knowledge and consent. We also let you know why we’re collecting it and how it will be used.
privacidade.s2_text: We only retain collected information for as long as necessary to provide you with your requested service. What data we store, we’ll protect within commercially acceptable means to prevent loss and theft, as well as unauthorized access, disclosure, copying, use or modification.
privacidade.s3_text: We don’t share any personally identifying information publicly or with third-parties, except when required to by law.
privacidade.s4_text: Our website may link to external sites that are not operated by us. Please be aware that we have no control over the content and practices of these sites, and cannot accept responsibility or liability for their respective privacy policies.
privacidade.s5_text: You are free to refuse our request for your personal information, with the understanding that we may be unable to provide you with some of your desired services. Your continued use of our website will be regarded as acceptance of our practices around privacy and personal information.
privacidade.s6_text: If you have any questions about how we handle user data and personal information, feel free to contact us through our official channels.

termos.title: Termos e Condições de Uso
termos.intro: Bem-vindo ao site da 7 Seas Global. Ao acessar e utilizar nossos serviços, você concorda em cumprir e estar vinculado aos seguintes termos de uso.
termos.s1_text: Os serviços de cotação, rastreamento e informações de logística internacional prestados por este site estão sujeitos à aceitação integral destes termos. Se você não concorda com qualquer parte, não deverá utilizar nossos canais.
termos.s2_text: O usuário é responsável pela veracidade e exatidão dos dados inseridos nos formulários de contato e cotação, ciente de que informações incorretas podem inviabilizar o planejamento logístico e operacional de cargas.
termos.s3_text: A 7 Seas Global reserva-se o direito de modificar, suspender ou descontinuar qualquer aspecto do site ou de seus serviços logísticos a qualquer momento, sem aviso prévio.
